IPL 2026 Auction: Complete Player List & Base Prices

Dec 10, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

IPL 2026 Auction: Complete Player List & Base Prices

The IPL 2026 auction is set to feature 359 players, including 245 Indian stars and 114 overseas cricketers, competing for 77 available slots across 10 franchises. This year’s mini-auction on December 16 promises an exciting mix of established T20 performers and promising young talent, with marquee players like Steve Smith and Quinton de Kock drawing attention.
